title: Infosys appoints Diane Enberg Jurgens and re-appoints Helene Auriol Potier as Independent Directors
detailed_summary: Infosys approved governance changes involving two independent directors, subject to shareholder approval. Diane Enberg Jurgens was appointed as an Additional Director in the category of Non-Executive, Independent Director, effective April 22, 2026, for a three-year term through April 21, 2029. Helene Auriol Potier was re-appointed as an Independent Director for a second five-year term from May 26, 2026 to May 25, 2031. The company stated that both directors are not related to any board member and are not debarred from holding director office by SEBI or any other such authority.

key_facts.fact: Diane Enberg Jurgens (DIN - 11585200) was appointed as an Additional Director in the category of Non-Executive, Independent Director, subject to approval of shareholders.
Diane Enberg Jurgens will serve as an Independent Director for the term of three years from April 22, 2026 to April 21, 2029, not liable to retire by rotation.
Helene Auriol Potier (DIN - 10166891) was re-appointed as Independent Director of the Company for the second term of five years, subject to approval of shareholders.
Helene Auriol Potier will serve as an Independent Director for the second term of five years from May 26, 2026 to May 25, 2031, not liable to retire by rotation.
Infosys stated that Diane Enberg Jurgens and Helene Auriol Potier are not related to any of the Directors of the Company.
Infosys stated that declarations were obtained that Diane Enberg Jurgens and Helene Auriol Potier are not debarred from holding office of a Director by SEBI or any other such authority.

leadership_changes.role: Additional Director in the category of Non-Executive, Independent Director
